subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God unto him who hath clung to His remembrance when He appeared in truth with manifest sovereignty. Say: Whosoever turneth away from this Remembrance, verily he [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله لمن تمسک بذکره اذ ظهر بالحق بسلطان مبین قل من اعرض عن هذا الذکر انه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
